divergences.decision: System scope is openYuanrong DataSystem: a distributed cache exposing KV, object, stream, and heterogeneous-NPU interfaces, consumed through the documented SDKs plus dscli/dsbench.
divergences.detail: The PR adds a new Notify CLI specification, docs, production module, and tests under docs/notify.md, specs/demo-notify.md, plans/demo-notify.md, src/notify/notifier.py, and tests/test_notifier.py. This notification API is unrelated to the MM's bounded context and is not one of the documented interface families or CLI channels.
divergences.evidence: src/notify/notifier.py:new file; specs/demo-notify.md:new file; docs/notify.md:new file
divergences.fix: Remove the unrelated Notify CLI from this repository, or update the mental model and product scope through the appropriate maintainer decision if this is now an intended datasystem capability.

divergences.decision: Conventional constraint: every source file carries the Apache-2.0 + Huawei copyright header.
divergences.detail: The newly added Python source and test files start directly with a docstring/imports and do not include the copyright/license header required by the MM conventional constraints.
divergences.fix: Add the repository-standard Apache-2.0 + Huawei copyright header to new source files, or update the mental model if this convention no longer applies to Python/test sources.
